zh.lifeSummary: 當Hester Clifton於1528年9月29日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾拉梅時，她的父親Sir William Clifton38歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Blount38歲。她於大約1550年4月與Sir Myles Sandys在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1577年在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hester Clifton于1528年9月29日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾拉梅时，她的父亲Sir William Clifton38岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Blount38岁。她于大约1550年4月与Sir Myles Sandys在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1577年在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Hester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Esther , of medieval origin. For a long while the two forms were interchangeable, the addition or dropping of h- being commonplace in a whole range of words, but now they are generally regarded as two distinct names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Hester Clifton was born on 29 September 1528, in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir William Clifton, was 38 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Blount, was 38. She married Sir Myles Sandys about April 1550, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1577, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hester Clifton est née le 29 septembre 1528, à Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Clifton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Blount, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Myles Sandys environ avril 1550, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1577, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hester Clifton am 29. September 1528 in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Clifton 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Blount 38. Sie hat um April 1550 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Myles Sandys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1577 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hester Clifton è nata il il 29 settembre 1528 nel Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Clifton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Blount, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Myles Sandys circa aprile 1550, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1577, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hester Cliftonが1528年9月29日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラティマーで生まれた時，父Sir William Cliftonは38歳，母Lady Elizabeth Blountは38歳であった。約1550年4月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Myles Sandysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1577年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hester Clifton(이)가 1528년 9월 29일 영국 벅잉함실르 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Clifton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Blount(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir Myles Sandys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1577년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hester Clifton nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1528, em Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Clifton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Blount, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Myles Sandys aproximadamente abril de 1550, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1577, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hester Clifton родилась 29 сентября 1528 г. в местности латимир, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Clifton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Blount, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Myles Sandys около апрель 1550 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1577 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hester Clifton nació el 29 de septiembre de 1528, en Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Clifton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Blount, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Myles Sandys aproximadamente abril de 1550, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1577, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
